title: The Interval (remote violence)
public_claim: The Interval is a MuranoOS room handoff for studying remote violence as a structure of separation between perception, command, vulnerability, and consequence.
distinctive_mechanism: It routes remote-violence analysis through distance, mediation, command chain, target vulnerability, perception gap, moral injury, and institutional responsibility.
use_value: It turns an abstract ethical problem into an inspectable analytical chamber for conflict, technology, perception, and accountability.
